name: 11111Game
short_description: Master addition in different bases. Slide tiles to add them, take advantage of overflow mechanic and game's grid.
detailed_description:
There are 10 types of people - those who can understand binary and those who can't.
With this game, you will easily become 01 of them!



SLIDE AND ADD
Move all tiles on a grid - they perform an addition when merged. You need to make a specific number to gain a score. The blank space in the middle and overflow mechanic help you create the numbers you need and prevent you from scoring randomly.

Yes, 11111Game is a 2048 variation for nerds.



NOT ONLY BINARY
Learn addition in different bases, even those less popular.
2+2=4? Sometimes yes. Sometimes no.



LEARN AND CHILL
Unlock new skins after completing levels. There is no time limit. Just learn and enjoy chill music.

supported_languages: English, Polish, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Bosnian, Hebrew, Indonesian, Ukrainian
